# Ground-truth annotation: river.jpg

Known-correct description of the image, used by the e2e grader to score a
model's perception. Derived from direct inspection of the committed file.

## Must-have facts (a correct description should cover these)

- An overhead / top-down view of a fast-flowing mountain river or stream.
- White, foamy, churning whitewater runs roughly down the center, where the
  water is most turbulent.
- The deeper, calmer water is a teal / blue-green color.
- Wet rocks and boulders line both sides; the right side is a dense field of
  rounded grey-brown stones, the left side has fewer, larger dark rocks.
- The overall mood is dark and moody; muted, low light.
- A natural outdoor scene; no people, animals, or man-made objects.

## Must-NOT-claim (hallucination markers)

- No people, boats, buildings, bridges, or vehicles.
- No text, signs, or watermarks.
- Not a beach, ocean, or waterfall viewed from the side; this is a downward
  view of a river between rocks.
- No wildlife, fish, or vegetation as a prominent subject.
- Not a sunny or brightly lit scene.
